steps.t: Scout-master Ausma has asked you to introduce yourself to her apprentices. You should talk to Kyrstig, Molkha, and Klúso in Bárgstad.
Now that you have met the new scouts, you should decide upon your course of action in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should talk to Scout-master Ausma in B…
Somewhere in the heart of the Stonejaws is the hobgoblin fort Shakhajât. You should find Shakhajât and help Ausma with Just a Warm-up.
You have located the hobgoblin fort in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should talk to Scout-master Ausma in Bárgstad.
